Bad Idea | Wine Bar & Restaurant in Nashville, TN
0
1021 Russell Street in East Nashville
a place for food & wine
Reservations
Click here to reserve on OpenTable!
Menu
With a kitchen led by Chef David Breeden whose background brings a refined, ingredient-driven approach grounded in technique and restraint. Together, the food and wine programs create an experience that is thoughtful, welcoming and intentional.

Contact
Phone (Text Preferred): (629) 729-4332
Email: info@badideanashville.com
Instagram: @badideanashville.com
FAQ
Do you accept
walk-ins
? Yes! While we do suggest making a reservation, our bar and lounge operate on a first come, first served basis.
What
parking
options are available? Only street parking, though we suggest taking a cab, ride-share, or public transit.
May I bring
children
? Yes, though we don’t offer a special menu or high chairs.
Hiring
Interested in working with us? Contact careers@badideanashville.com
